recording_library_browser_test.method: Headless Chromium with an in-memory storage adapter

indexeddb.reason: The automated environment blocks navigation to local or synthetic origins. Run Status > Run self-test in Chrome or Edge to verify IndexedDB write, list, ZIP build and delete on the actual device.

manual_test_path: Record and send two Conversation responses.
End the session and refresh the page.
Export the Recording Archive and open the ZIP.
Delete one audio recording and verify its transcript remains.
